so the model is always going to look at for your subject property.
How many leases have been signed in the last 84 days, and it's going to weight more heavily to leases that have been signed more recently.

in addition to that, it's going to look at other things like, how are you asking rents versus your recently achieved rents?

We're going to be using a net effective basis.
